official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and the block_changed_ack packet id.
Official binary source for constructing, decoding, and writing the block_changed_ack body.
Official binary source for the sequence field body shape.
Official binary source for writing and dispatch-decoding the full Play clientbound block_changed_ack frame.

field_notes.fixture: Uses the official constructor and STREAM_CODEC with a single integer sequence, then re-encodes through the official Play clientbound protocol codec. The sequence value is context-free and does not require initialized Minecraft/game state.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound block_changed_ack packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official sequence fixture only; do not infer block prediction semantics, client world correction behavior, initialized game state, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
